description: Site currently has no favicon (index.html has no <link rel='icon'>). Hand-author an SVG of the octahedron geometry silhouette in Fractal brand palette, ship it as /public/favicon.svg + fallback /public/favicon.ico (or PNG), and wire the <link rel='icon'> + apple-touch-icon tags into index.html.\n\nWhy SVG: crisp at all sizes, tiny file, no build step, matches the brand's geometric language.
title: Add favicon: hand-authored SVG octahedron silhouette
